description: Detects `Record<string, any>` which is a type-unsafe catch-all. Simplified from Rust: flags all generic_type nodes and index_signature nodes. Cannot filter to only Record<string, any> or index signatures with `any` value type -- all generic types and index signatures flagged. Language scoped to typescript only.

flag.message: Generic type or index signature detected -- if using `Record<string, any>` or `{ [key: string]: any }`, prefer a specific value type or `unknown`
